name: copilot-prompt-manager
description: Manage, organize and use AI prompts directly in VS Code with Copilot Chat integration

promptManager.improvePromptInstructions.description: Additional instructions for AI prompt text improvement (button "Генерация").
default: Пиши ответ с обращением к одному лицу.

promptManager.allowedBranches.description: Allowed Git branches for branch mismatch checks and highlighting.

promptManager.copilotStatusBar.enabled.description: Enable/disable Copilot Premium usage progress bar in the status bar.

promptManager.copilotPremiumRequestsLimi.description: Custom monthly limit for Copilot Premium requests. Set to 0 to auto-detect from subscription type.

promptManager.copilotUsage.debugVerbose.description: Enable verbose Copilot usage debug log in usage panel. Disable for compact log.

promptManager.debugLogging.enabled.description: Enable Prompt Manager debug logging for key extension flows in the Prompt Manager output channel. Keep disabled unless you are debugging extension behavior.

promptManager.captureAgentFinalResponse.description: Save the final agent chat response to the prompt report and include it in afterChatCompleted hooks (for example, Telegram integrations).

promptManager.startup.openTracker.description: Automatically open the Prompt Tracker panel when VS Code starts.

promptManager.startup.restoreLastOpenPro.description: Automatically reopen the last prompt editor on startup if it was open when VS Code was closed.

promptManager.memory.enabled.description: Enable the Project Memory system (collects and analyses git commits with AI).

promptManager.memory.aiModel.description: Language model family for commit analysis (e.g. gpt-5-mini, gpt-4.1).

promptManager.memory.analysisDepth.description: Depth of AI analysis: minimal (fast, no diff), standard (summary + insights), deep (includes knowledge graph and bug detection).

promptManager.memory.diffLimit.description: Maximum diff characters sent to AI for analysis.

promptManager.memory.httpPort.description: Fixed port for the local HTTP server receiving hook data. Set to 0 for a random available port.

promptManager.memory.maxRecords.description: Maximum number of commits stored in the memory database.

promptManager.memory.retentionDays.description: Data retention period in days. Older commits are automatically cleaned up.

promptManager.memory.shortTermLimit.description: Number of recent commits included in the short-term memory context.

promptManager.memory.historyAnalysisLimi.description: Maximum number of recent commits to analyze when running manual history analysis from the Memory page.

promptManager.memory.autoCleanup.description: Automatically clean up old data on activation and periodically.

promptManager.memory.notifications.enabl.description: Show notifications when commits are analysed.

promptManager.memory.notifications.type.description: Notification style: info (popup), statusbar (status bar item), silent (log only).

promptManager.memory.embeddings.enabled.description: Enable semantic search via Transformers.js embeddings. The model (~30 MB) will be downloaded in the background.

promptManager.memory.knowledgeGraph.enab.description: Enable knowledge graph construction from deep analysis.

promptManager.memory.projectMap.enabled.description: Include a compact ASCII project file map in generated chat memory instructions.

promptManager.memory.projectMap.maxDepth.description: Maximum directory depth for the generated project file map.

promptManager.memory.projectMap.excluded.description: Additional folders or relative paths to exclude from the generated project file map.

promptManager.memory.projectMap.maxEntri.description: Maximum number of rendered tree nodes in the generated project file map.

promptManager.codemap.enabled.description: Enable the codemap instruction system for branch-aware code map files used during chat sessions.

promptManager.codemap.trackedBranches.description: Tracked branches that should maintain base codemap instructions in the background.

promptManager.codemap.excludedPaths.description: Folder names or path prefixes to exclude from codemap generation. Paths covered by tracked .gitignore files are also skipped automatically.

promptManager.codemap.autoUpdate.description: Automatically refresh tracked codemap instructions in the background.

promptManager.codemap.notifications.enab.description: Show notifications for codemap refresh state changes.

promptManager.codemap.aiModel.description: Copilot chat model family used for AI requests during codemap instruction generation, for example gpt-5-mini or gpt-4.1.

promptManager.codemap.instructionMaxChar.description: Maximum target size for a single persisted codemap instruction.

promptManager.codemap.blockDescriptionMo.description: Preferred description depth for codemap blocks.

promptManager.codemap.blockMaxChars.description: Maximum size for a single block description in codemap generation.

promptManager.codemap.batchContextMaxCha.description: Estimated maximum total context size for one codemap AI batch. Increase it to send more code in one request, or lower it to keep batches tighter and more focused.

promptManager.codemap.areaBatchMaxItems.description: Maximum number of code areas packed into one AI batch during area description generation. Lower values isolate areas better; higher values reduce the number of requests.

promptManager.codemap.symbolBatchMaxItem.description: Maximum number of code symbols (classes, methods, functions, constants) packed into one AI batch for detailed file-element descriptions.

promptManager.codemap.symbolBatchMaxFile.description: Maximum number of different files that may be mixed into one AI symbol-description batch. Lower values keep the request focused on fewer files.

promptManager.codemap.updatePriority.description: Background refresh priority for codemap jobs.

promptManager.codemap.startupDelayMs.description: Delay before the first automatic codemap refresh after activation.

promptManager.codemap.maxVersionsPerInst.description: Maximum number of persisted versions per unique codemap instruction.

scripts.build: npm run build:extension && npm run build:webview && npm run copy:wasm
scripts.test: npm run test:compile && npm run test:run
scripts.test:compile: node -e "require('fs').rmSync('out-tests', { recursive: true, force: true })" && tsc -p tsconfig.tests.json
scripts.watch:esbuild: npm run watch:extension & npm run watch:webview
